title: Agent Prompt Templates
body: Copy-paste system and user prompt templates for consuming basemouse.context_pack.v1. Render each entry with its citation label, prefer higher relevance.score and more recent provenance.updatedAt, and verify provenance.checksum before trusting a claim. Includes wiring notes for CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGen, and custom agents. See docs/agent-integration.md.
author: BaseMouse Core
